# Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech Proof Sprint

Name: Accion Trust by Design express proof sprint

Window: 2026-05-30 to 2026-06-05

Convert the student partner track package into a partner-authorized Accion submission with real traction, gender-disaggregated metrics, and trust outcomes.

## Metrics

| Status | Metric | Current | Target | Evidence |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| partner_required | Eligible fintech partner | 0 | 1 | `docs/partner_fintech_required.md` |
| partner_required | Partner GDD export | 0 | 1 | `docs/gender_disaggregated_metrics.md` |
| done | Trust report generator | 1 | 1 | `evidence/trust_report.json` |
| done | Submission dry-run | 1 | 1 | `automation/evidence/dry-run` |

## Execution Steps

| Day | Status | Owner | Step | Output |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| D0 | done | student team | Package, demo, and automation freeze | Application-ready packet |
| D1 | partner_required | partner representative | Partner legal and metric intake | Approved facts, GDD export, authority confirmation |
| D2 | ready_for_authorized_session | partner representative | Authorized Microsoft Forms submit | Submission confirmation receipt |

## Win Conditions

- No claim depends on synthetic data in the final submitted form.
- The applicant has authority to bind the fintech to official rules.
- Submission keeps privacy, consent, and harm-reduction safeguards explicit.
